## What

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## How it was tested

- [ ] `cd contracts && forge test`
- [ ] `cd verifier && npm test`
- [ ] `bash scripts/check-no-leaks.sh`

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, keys, or absolute home paths added
- [ ] No live trading parameters or position state (those are not public)
- [ ] Commits are lowercase, imperative, no attribution trailers
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
